name: typescript-serverless-starter
description: AWS Serverless starter with API Gateway, Lambda, DynamoDB, and Vite frontend with Cognito (auth.b.lfg.new)

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd infra && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
